title: Daniel Sloss: SO?
full_description: An endearingly unabashed blend of arrogance, awkwardness and self-effacing anecdotes delivered with precision timing and unfettered confidence. Nothing is off limits. Sloss skilfully weaves sensitive subject matter into a hilarious tapestry of politically incorrect and sexually inappropriate zingers — his humour intelligently and ironically calling out the hypocrisy of human nature. Later released on Netflix as 'Jigsaw'.
ai_summary: SO? — later retitled Jigsaw for Netflix — is the show where Sloss crystallised his philosophy on love and relationships, building to a meditation on why most relationships fail that reportedly caused over 100,000 couples to break up after the special aired.
